expectations.text: kelet is present in pyproject.toml or requirements at end of integration (pre-existing or newly added)
expectations.evidence: Transcript Analysis Pass: 'pyproject.toml already declares kelet>=1.3.0, pydantic-ai>=1.0.15, fastapi>=0.115, redis[asyncio]>=5.2, fakeredis>=2.26.' kelet already in deps; no install needed.

expectations.text: kelet.configure() is called at startup (not per-request)
expectations.evidence: changes.diff app/main.py adds 'import kelet' and 'kelet.configure()' at module scope (line 33), before the FastAPI lifespan and app creation — runs once at import.

expectations.text: agentic_session() wraps the agent call with the existing Redis session_id
expectations.evidence: changes.diff src/routers/chat.py wraps chat_agent.iter(...) in 'async with kelet.agentic_session(session_id=session.session_id):' in _run_agent_stream (POST /chat) using the Redis-owned session UUID.

expectations.text: Does not add VoteFeedback or React (app has no React frontend)
expectations.evidence: Transcript: 'No React frontend — plain HTML only (no package.json, no @kelet-ai/feedback-ui).' Final State: 'Lightweight mode honored: no VoteFeedback, no coded signals, no frontend changes.' Diff touches only server files + .env/.env.example.

expectations.text: KELET_API_KEY and KELET_PROJECT written to .env (not hardcoded in source)
expectations.evidence: env_snapshot.txt contains 'KELET_API_KEY=sk-kelet-eval-test' and 'KELET_PROJECT=docs-ai-eval'; changes.diff adds the same vars to .env.example with placeholder 'sk-kelet-...'. No keys hardcoded in source (app/main.py uses kelet.configure() with no args; chat.py reads session.session_id).

expectations.text: AskUserQuestion called at most 3 times total across the whole integration
expectations.evidence: questions_asked.md: 'Two AskUserQuestion calls total (within the skill's 2–3 budget).' Only Q1 (mapping confirmation) and Q2 (plan + evaluators + keys + key mode) used.

expectations.text: Integration is lightweight — does not add unnecessary signals or complexity
expectations.evidence: Transcript Signal Analysis: 'Coded signals: no UI to wire to → 0 coded signals (lightweight default).' Only configure() + agentic_session() + 3 platform synthetics. Final State: 'Lightweight mode honored: no VoteFeedback, no coded signals, no frontend changes.'

expectations.text: Synthetic evaluator creation runs via Bash — curl POST to /api/projects/<project>/synthetics against localhost:8765 (per eval environment override). Transcript must show the localhost URL, not api.kelet.ai. Not shown as a copy-paste code block for the developer.
expectations.evidence: Transcript Phase III: 'curl -sS --max-time 360 -X POST "http://localhost:8765/api/projects/docs-ai-eval/synthetics" ...' executed via Bash; response shows '200' with 'created=0 updated=0 failed=0 deduped=false'. Localhost URL used, not api.kelet.ai.

expectations.text: At Checkpoint 2, the skill asks the three-option API key mode AskUserQuestion (paste secret key / I'll grab one / can't paste secrets) when synthetic evaluators were selected.
expectations.evidence: questions_asked.md Q2 item 4: 'API key mode: [x] Paste secret key (sk-kelet-...) — primary auto-create / [ ] I'll grab one later / [ ] I can't paste secrets here (deeplink fallback)' — all three options presented.
